bountykit.prompt: Act as the primary bountykit coordinator. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/manual/workflow.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/control-room.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/guardrails/hunting.md, then delegate to lane-specialist agents as needed.

surface_cartographer.prompt: Act as a surface specialist. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/surface-cartographer.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/survey.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/surface-mapping/SKILL.md. Rank scoped surface and stop when shallow recon goes flat.

verdict_engine.prompt: Act as verdict engine. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/verdict-engine.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/screen.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/gate.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/guardrails/reporting.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/verdict-gate/SKILL.md. Return one decision (PASS/KILL/DOWNGRADE/CHAIN REQUIRED) plus next action.

evidence_editor.prompt: Act as evidence editor. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/evidence-editor.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/brief.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/guardrails/reporting.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/disclosure-lab/SKILL.md. Return concise evidence-first output without speculation.

pivot_engine.prompt: Act as pivot engine. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/pivot-engine.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/pivot.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/exploit-atlas/SKILL.md plus __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/field-manual/SKILL.md. Return only provable chains.

contract_cartographer.prompt: Act as contract cartographer. Read __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/contract-cartographer.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/contract-sweep.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/contract-review/SKILL.md. Apply pre-dive filters, then audit by bug class.

bountykit.description: Start from the full bountykit workflow
bountykit.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/manual/workflow.md and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/control-room.md. If target/context is missing, ask once. Then route to the right specialist lane.

hunt.description: Use the full mission track directly
hunt.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/field-manual/SKILL.md. Apply the full mission loop to the current target, feature, or finding.

field-manual.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/field-manual/SKILL.md. Apply the full mission loop to the current target, feature, or finding.

surface-mapping.description: Use the recon and surface-mapping track
surface-mapping.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/surface-mapping/SKILL.md. Focus on recon, asset discovery, and attack-surface ranking for the current target.

exploit-atlas.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/exploit-atlas/SKILL.md. Apply the most relevant bug-class tactics to the current target or feature.

payload-bank.description: Use the payload and bypass track
payload-bank.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/payload-bank/SKILL.md. Return the best payloads, bypasses, and kill-signals for the current test case.

verdict-gate.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/verdict-gate/SKILL.md. Return PASS, KILL, DOWNGRADE, or CHAIN REQUIRED with the missing proof step.

disclosure-lab.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/disclosure-lab/SKILL.md. Write or improve the current report with exact evidence and severity logic.

contract-review.description: Use the smart contract review track
contract-review.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/contract-review/SKILL.md. Apply the contract review lane to the current codebase, protocol, or finding.

boundary.description: Check scope and ownership before testing
boundary.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/boundary.md. Determine whether the asset is owned by the target and clearly in scope. Stop if the answer is not defensible.

survey.description: Map the attack surface for a target
survey.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/survey.md. If a target is present, use it; otherwise ask for one concise target/domain. Return the best surface to probe next.

probe.description: Run a focused hunt on a target or feature
probe.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/probe.md, __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/manual/workflow.md, and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/roles/control-room.md. Keep tests narrow: confirm scope, pick one lane, and delegate if recon/validation/chaining/reporting/contract work becomes primary.

mission.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/mission.md and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/manual/autonomous-operations.md. Enforce scope and stop conditions. Return PASS/KILL/DOWNGRADE/CHAIN REQUIRED with next action and lane routing.

autopilot.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/mission.md with the same target and constraints used for /mission.

intel.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/intel.md. Produce a concise intelligence-first recommendation before heavy probing.

pickup.description: Resume a prior hunt session for the target
pickup.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/pickup.md. Resume known state and continue from the best surviving lead.

recall.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/recall.md. Return the narrowest high-signal memory signal and next action.

cicd-scan.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/cicd-scan.md. Perform lightweight CI/CD checks and report critical findings only.

screen.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/screen.md and return a fast GO, KILL, or DOWNGRADE with the missing proof step if any.

gate.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/gate.md and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/verdict-gate/SKILL.md. Return PASS, KILL, DOWNGRADE, or CHAIN REQUIRED.

pivot.description: Escalate a weak finding into a stronger chain
pivot.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/pivot.md. Start from the confirmed bug A, choose the best B and C candidates, and keep only defensible chains.

brief.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/brief.md and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/disclosure-lab/SKILL.md. Return a concise, evidence-first report with severity and remediation.

contract-sweep.description: Run the smart contract review lane
contract-sweep.template: Use __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/playbooks/contract-sweep.md and __BOUNTYKIT_ROOT__/tracks/contract-review/SKILL.md. Apply pre-dive kill signals first, then audit by bug class.
